# URI.Disable.txt 知识梳理

> 来源: `URI.Disable.txt` | 字数: 272

## 内容全文

URI.Disable

TYPE: bool

VERSION: 1.3.0

DEFAULT: false

--DESCRIPTION--

<p>

Disables all URIs in all forms. Not sure why you'd want to do that

(after all, the Internet's founded on the notion of a hyperlink).

</p>

--ALIASES--

Attr.DisableURI
